command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.192 "echo === backups ===; systemctl is-active backrest; systemctl is-active cron"; ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.198 "echo === nextcloud ===; systemctl is-active nginx; systemctl is-active php8.4-fpm; systemctl is-active gdrive-sync"; ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 "echo === openclaw ===; systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway; systemctl is-active nginx"; ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.200 "echo === vaultwarden ===; systemctl is-active docker; docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}" 2>/dev/null"; ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.201 "echo === dashboard ===; systemctl is-active docker; docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}" 2>/dev/null | head -5"; ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.203 "echo === ollama ===; systemctl is-active ollama; ollama list 2>/dev/null | head -5"
